alkylation reagent: alkylation with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min
cleavage agent: followed by trypsin digestion (0.25 μg, 37°C, overnight)
collision energy: fragmented with high energy collision (HCD) mode, with a stepped collision energy of 30 ± 5%
fragmentation method: fragmented with high energy collision (HCD) mode
instrument: using an Orbitrap Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: liquid chromatography-nano electrospray ionization-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-nESI-MS/MS)
labeling: Quantitative proteomics, by way of dimethyl isotope labelling
